lines.english: Lesson 133
lines.raw: Lesson 133 | 第133课

lines.english: Sensational news!
lines.raw: Sensational news! | 轰动新闻！

lines.english: Listen to the tape then answer this question.
lines.chinese: 听录音，然后回答这个问题。
lines.raw: Listen to the tape then answer this question. | 听录音，然后回答这个问题。

lines.english: What reasons did Karen Marsh give for wanting to retire?
lines.chinese: 凯伦·马什给出哪些理由想要退休？
lines.raw: What reasons did Karen Marsh give for wanting to retire? | 凯伦·马什给出哪些理由想要退休？

lines.english: Have you just made a new film, Miss Marsh?
lines.chinese: 马什小姐，您刚拍了一部新电影吗？
lines.raw: Have you just made a new film, Miss Marsh? | 马什小姐，您刚拍了一部新电影吗？

lines.english: Yes, I have.
lines.raw: Yes, I have. | 是的，我拍了。

lines.english: Are you going to make another?
lines.raw: Are you going to make another? | 您还要再拍一部吗？

lines.english: No, I'm not.
lines.raw: No, I'm not. | 不，我不拍了。

lines.english: I'm going to retire.
lines.raw: I'm going to retire. | 我要退休了。

lines.english: I feel very tired.
lines.raw: I feel very tired. | 我觉得很累。

lines.english: I don't want to make another film for a long time.
lines.chinese: 我很长时间都不想再拍电影了。
lines.raw: I don't want to make another film for a long time. | 我很长时间都不想再拍电影了。

lines.english: Let's buy a newspaper, Liz.
lines.raw: Let's buy a newspaper, Liz. | 丽兹，我们买份报纸吧。

lines.english: Listen to this!
lines.raw: Listen to this! | 听听这个！

lines.english: 'Karen Marsh: Sensational News!
lines.raw: 'Karen Marsh: Sensational News! | “凯伦·马什：轰动新闻！

lines.english: By our reporter, Alan Jones.
lines.raw: By our reporter, Alan Jones. | 记者：艾伦·琼斯。

lines.english: Karen Marsh arrived at London Airport today.
lines.chinese: 凯伦·马什今天抵达伦敦机场。
lines.raw: Karen Marsh arrived at London Airport today. | 凯伦·马什今天抵达伦敦机场。

lines.english: She was wearing a blue dress and a mink coat.
lines.chinese: 她穿着一件蓝色连衣裙和一件貂皮大衣。
lines.raw: She was wearing a blue dress and a mink coat. | 她穿着一件蓝色连衣裙和一件貂皮大衣。

lines.english: She told me she had just made a new film.
lines.chinese: 她告诉我她刚拍了一部新电影。
lines.raw: She told me she had just made a new film. | 她告诉我她刚拍了一部新电影。

lines.english: she said she was not going to make another.
lines.raw: she said she was not going to make another. | 她说她不会再拍了。

lines.english: She said she was going to retire.
lines.raw: She said she was going to retire. | 她说她要退休了。

lines.english: She told reporters she felt very tired and didn't want to make another film for a long time.'
lines.chinese: 她告诉记者她感到非常疲倦，并且很长时间都不想再拍电影了。”
lines.raw: She told reporters she felt very tired and didn't want to make another film for a long time.' | 她告诉记者她感到非常疲倦，并且很长时间都不想再拍电影了。”

lines.english: I wonder why!
lines.raw: I wonder why! | 我想知道为什么！
